Case# SFContentBlockerErrorCode.noAttachmentFound

iOS 9.0–10.0DeprecatediPadOS 9.0–10.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.4–13.4Deprecated

```
case noAttachmentFound
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/safariservices/sfcontentblockererrorcode/noattachmentfound#Discussion)

The Content Blocker extension returned an [`NSExtensionItem`](/documentation/Foundation/NSExtensionItem) that did not include an attachment.
